title: armeria villosa subsp. carratracensis
intro: Armeria villosa subsp. carratracensis, also known as the Alhucema or Carratarca thistle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from menstrual cramps, skin issues, and urinary tract infections, as well as its use as a natural diuretic and expectorant. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk remedies.
